message:
fix: skip remotesapi port check when no federation peers configured (GH#2273)

When the Dolt server is running but no federation peers are configured,
bd doctor no longer reports a false error about remotesapi port 8080
being unreachable. The check now mirrors the server-not-running path by
querying remotes and returning OK if none (excluding origin) exist.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
